title: A Pit in Spain Holds the Key to a Neanderthal DNA Mystery - David Reich
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews geneticist David Reich about Neanderthal DNA discoveries found at an archaeological site in Spain. The discussion explores mysteries surrounding ancient human genetics and what DNA analysis reveals about Neanderthal populations.
